subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses in truth and ordained therein the measures of all things, and verily He is the Mighty, the All-Choosing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق و قدر فیها مقادیر کل شی و انه لهو العزیز المختار
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment
